feed.title: Stephen Gabriel
feed.subtitle: Blog and portfolio focused on Kubernetes, Docker, Containers, DevOps, Reliability, Databases, Linux Cloud services and other technical content.

entry.title: The Imperative for Healthcare-Specific Databases; Enhancing Data Management and Patient Care

link.title: The Imperative for Healthcare-Specific Databases; Enhancing Data Management and Patient Care

entry.summary: Introduction The healthcare sector must deal with the difficulty of managing massive amounts of sensitive and complicated data. Traditional database management tools have failed to meet the specific requirements of the healthcare industry, leading to inefficiencies and even threats to patient safety. This article argues that the healthcare industry would benefit from the creation of specialize...

entry.title: AWS VPC Fundamentals; A Playful Exploration of Virtual Private Clouds

link.title: AWS VPC Fundamentals; A Playful Exploration of Virtual Private Clouds

entry.summary: Introduction Welcome to the whimsical world of AWS VPC, where we will embark on a delightful journey to understand the fundamentals of Virtual Private Clouds. With playful diagrams and straightforward explanations, we will simplify the complex concepts of AWS VPC, making it a breeze for you to grasp and apply this powerful tool. What is AWS VPC? Picture AWS VPC (Virtual Private Cloud) as you...

entry.title: A Kubernetes Poem
entry.summary: Gather ‘round, young friends, and hear, A story about Kubernetes, so clear, A tale that’s fun and easy to grasp, In a simple poem, you’ll soon clasp. Imagine a harbor full of ships, Each carrying cargo on many trips, The harbor master, strong and wise, Keeps things organized, no surprise. Now think of computers, big and small, Working together, answering every call, To store data and run code...

entry.title: AI in Healthcare; The Intersection of Medicine, Software Engineering, and Ethics

link.title: AI in Healthcare; The Intersection of Medicine, Software Engineering, and Ethics

entry.summary: Introduction Artificial intelligence’s (AI) meteoric rise has already had far-reaching effects in a number of sectors, one of the most promising being healthcare. Researchers, companies, and investors are all paying close attention to artificial intelligence because of its potentially transformative effects on medical diagnosis, treatment, and patient care (1). To properly utilize AI, however,...

entry.title: How to grep in 5 minutes
entry.summary: Linux grep is a command-line utility that allows users to search for specific strings of text within a file or multiple files. It is an incredibly useful tool for anyone working with large amounts of text data, as it allows you to quickly and easily find specific information. To use grep, you simply specify the string you are searching for and the file or files you want to search within. For e...
